export SUPABASE_URL="https://kvclcdjmjghndxsngfzb.supabase.co"
export SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY="eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJpc3MiOiJzdXBhYmFzZSIsInJlZiI6Imt2Y2xjZGptamdobmR4c25nZnpiIiwicm9sZSI6InNlcnZpY2Vfcm9sZSIsImlhdCI6MTc3MzE5NDAyNywiZXhwIjoyMDg4NzcwMDI3fQ.TaTRyViK-8sv3R_g1Me08sEjnyMskGXKF0u-I-PTaQ8"

# Get encrypted GITHUB_TOKEN and OWNER_NEW_PASSWORD
curl -s "${SUPABASE_URL}/rest/v1/ivx_owner_variables?select=name,encrypted_value,value_iv,value_tag&name=in.(GITHUB_TOKEN,OWNER_NEW_PASSWORD,APP_SECRET)" \
  -H "apikey: ${SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY}" \
  -H "Authorization: Bearer ${SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY}" 2>&1 | python3 -c "
import sys, json, base64, hashlib
from Crypto.Cipher import AES

data = json.load(sys.stdin)
jwt_secret = 'b78a8571-386f-4f36-9be4-fa2de5d076e40bde8885-fc19-4564-9d91-a413db46e904'
encryption_key = hashlib.sha256(jwt_secret.encode('utf-8')).digest()
aad = b'ivx_owner_variables:v1'

for row in data:
    name = row['name']
    iv = base64.b64decode(row['value_iv'])
    tag = base64.b64decode(row['value_tag'])
    ciphertext = base64.b64decode(row['encrypted_value'])
    try:
        cipher = AES.new(encryption_key, AES.MODE_GCM, nonce=iv)
        cipher.update(aad)
        plaintext = cipher.decrypt_and_verify(ciphertext, tag).decode('utf-8')
        if name == 'GITHUB_TOKEN':
            print(f'GITHUB_TOKEN={plaintext}')
        elif name == 'OWNER_NEW_PASSWORD':
            print(f'OWNER_PASSWORD={plaintext}')
        elif name == 'APP_SECRET':
            print(f'APP_SECRET={plaintext}')
    except Exception as e:
        print(f'{name}=DECRYPT_FAILED: {e}')
" 2>&1

# Query all IVX tables for row counts
TABLES="members investors buyers realtors brokers tokenized wallets ledger treasury transactions withdrawals fees analytics jv_deals properties conversations messages chat_attachments deposits revenue registrations audit_logs variables_metadata"

for table in $TABLES; do
  COUNT=$(curl -s "${SUPABASE_URL}/rest/v1/${table}?select=id&limit=1" \
    -H "apikey: ${SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY}" \
    -H "Authorization: Bearer ${SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY}" \
    -H "Prefer: count=exact" \
    -H "Range: 0-0" -o /dev/null -w "%{http_code}" 2>&1)
  
  if [ "$COUNT" = "206" ] || [ "$COUNT" = "200" ]; then
    # Get actual count from content-range header
    RANGE=$(curl -sI "${SUPABASE_URL}/rest/v1/${table}?select=id&limit=1" \
      -H "apikey: ${SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY}" \
      -H "Authorization: Bearer ${SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY}" \
      -H "Prefer: count=exact" \
      -H "Range: 0-0" 2>&1 | grep -i content-range)
    echo "${table}: ${COUNT} — ${RANGE}"
  else
    echo "${table}: HTTP ${COUNT}"
  fi
done

export SUPABASE_URL="https://kvclcdjmjghndxsngfzb.supabase.co"
export SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY="eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJpc3MiOiJzdXBhYmFzZSIsInJlZiI6Imt2Y2xjZGptamdobmR4c25nZnpiIiwicm9sZSI6InNlcnZpY2Vfcm9sZSIsImlhdCI6MTc3MzE5NDAyNywiZXhwIjoyMDg4NzcwMDI3fQ.TaTRyViK-8sv3R_g1Me08sEjnyMskGXKF0u-I-PTaQ8"

# Query each existing table for full row counts
for table in investors wallets transactions jv_deals properties conversations messages revenue; do
  RESULT=$(curl -sI "${SUPABASE_URL}/rest/v1/${table}?select=id" \
    -H "apikey: ${SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY}" \
    -H "Authorization: Bearer ${SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY}" \
    -H "Prefer: count=exact" \
    -H "Range: 0-0" 2>&1)
  STATUS=$(echo "$RESULT" | head -1 | awk '{print $2}')
  RANGE=$(echo "$RESULT" | grep -i content-range | awk '{print $2}' | tr -d '\r')
  echo "${table}: HTTP=${STATUS} count=${RANGE}"
done

input.command:
# Get all database tables via Supabase REST
export SUPABASE_URL="https://kvclcdjmjghndxsngfzb.supabase.co"
export SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY="eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJpc3MiOiJzdXBhYmFzZSIsInJlZiI6Imt2Y2xjZGptamdobmR4c25nZnpiIiwicm9sZSI6InNlcnZpY2Vfcm9sZSIsImlhdCI6MTc3MzE5NDAyNywiZXhwIjoyMDg4NzcwMDI3fQ.TaTRyViK-8sv3R_g1Me08sEjnyMskGXKF0u-I-PTaQ8"

# List all tables by querying the REST API for each known table name
TABLES="members investors buyers realtors brokers tokenized wallets ledger treasury transactions withdrawals fees analytics jv_deals properties conversations messages chat_attachments deposits revenue registrations audit_logs variables_metadata ivx_owner_variables ivx_owner_variable_audit profiles users profiles_deals deals investments deposits withdrawals_revenue"

for table in $TABLES; do
  STATUS=$(curl -s -o /dev/null -w "%{http_code}" "${SUPABASE_URL}/rest/v1/${table}?select=id&limit=1" \
    -H "apikey: ${SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY}" \
    -H "Authorization: Bearer ${SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY}" 2>&1)
  if [ "$STATUS" = "200" ] || [ "$STATUS" = "206" ]; then
    RANGE=$(curl -sI "${SUPABASE_URL}/rest/v1/${table}?select=id" \
      -H "apikey: ${SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY}" \
      -H "Authorization: Bearer ${SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY}" \
      -H "Prefer: count=exact" \
      -H "Range: 0-0" 2>&1 | grep -i content-range | awk '{print $2}' | tr -d '\r')
    echo "${table}: EXISTS count=${RANGE}"
  fi
done

# Query ALL existing tables for row counts via Supabase REST
export SB_URL="https://kvclcdjmjghndxsngfzb.supabase.co"
export SB_KEY="eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJpc3MiOiJzdXBhYmFzZSIsInJlZiI6Imt2Y2xjZGptamdobmR4c25nZnpiIiwicm9sZSI6InNlcnZpY2Vfcm9sZSIsImlhdCI6MTc3MzE5NDAyNywiZXhwIjoyMDg4NzcwMDI3fQ.TaTRyViK-8sv3R_g1Me08sEjnyMskGXKF0u-I-PTaQ8"

echo "=== TABLE ROW COUNTS ==="
for table in investors wallets transactions jv_deals properties conversations messages revenue profiles ivx_owner_variables ivx_owner_variable_audit; do
  RANGE=$(curl -sI "${SB_URL}/rest/v1/${table}?select=id" \
    -H "apikey: ${SB_KEY}" \
    -H "Authorization: Bearer ${SB_KEY}" \
    -H "Prefer: count=exact" \
    -H "Range: 0-0" 2>&1 | grep -i content-range | awk '{print $2}' | tr -d '\r')
  echo "${table}: ${RANGE:-NOT_FOUND}"
done

# FINANCIAL RECONCILIATION — direct Supabase queries
export SB_URL="https://kvclcdjmjghndxsngfzb.supabase.co"
export SB_KEY="eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJpc3MiOiJzdXBhYmFzZSIsInJlZiI6Imt2Y2xjZGptamdobmR4c25nZnpiIiwicm9sZSI6InNlcnZpY2Vfcm9sZSIsImlhdCI6MTc3MzE5NDAyNywiZXhwIjoyMDg4NzcwMDI3fQ.TaTRyViK-8sv3R_g1Me08sEjnyMskGXKF0u-I-PTaQ8"

echo "=== FINANCIAL RECONCILIATION ==="

# 1. Get all wallets
echo "--- WALLETS ---"
curl -s "${SB_URL}/rest/v1/wallets?select=id,user_id,available,pending,invested,total,currency&deleted_at=is.null" \
  -H "apikey: ${SB_KEY}" -H "Authorization: Bearer ${SB_KEY}" 2>&1 | python3 -c "
import sys, json
data = json.load(sys.stdin)
if isinstance(data, list):
    for w in data:
        print(f\"  wallet id={w.get('id','?')[:12]}... user={w.get('user_id','?')[:12]}... available={w.get('available',0)} pending={w.get('pending',0)} invested={w.get('invested',0)} total={w.get('total',0)} {w.get('currency','?')}\")
    print(f'  TOTAL_WALLETS={len(data)}')
else:
    print('  ERROR: ' + str(data)[:300])
"

# 2. Get all transactions
echo "--- TRANSACTIONS ---"
curl -s "${SB_URL}/rest/v1/transactions?select=id,user_id,type,amount,status&deleted_at=is.null" \
  -H "apikey: ${SB_KEY}" -H "Authorization: Bearer ${SB_KEY}" 2>&1 | python3 -c "
import sys, json
data = json.load(sys.stdin)
if isinstance(data, list):
    for t in data:
        print(f\"  txn id={t.get('id','?')[:20]} user={t.get('user_id','?')[:12]}... type={t.get('type','?')} amount={t.get('amount',0)} status={t.get('status','?')}\")
    print(f'  TOTAL_TRANSACTIONS={len(data)}')
else:
    print('  ERROR: ' + str(data)[:300])
"

# 3. Get investors count
echo "--- INVESTORS ---"
curl -sI "${SB_URL}/rest/v1/investors?select=id&deleted_at=is.null" \
  -H "apikey: ${SB_KEY}" -H "Authorization: Bearer ${SB_KEY}" \
  -H "Prefer: count=exact" -H "Range: 0-0" 2>&1 | grep -i content-range | awk '{print "  ACTIVE_INVESTORS=" $2}' | tr -d '\r'

# 4. Get profiles
echo "--- PROFILES ---"
curl -s "${SB_URL}/rest/v1/profiles?select=id,email,role&limit=10" \
  -H "apikey: ${SB_KEY}" -H "Authorization: Bearer ${SB_KEY}" 2>&1 | python3 -c "
import sys, json
data = json.load(sys.stdin)
if isinstance(data, list):
    for p in data:
        print(f\"  profile id={p.get('id','?')[:12]}... email={p.get('email','?')} role={p.get('role','?')}\")
    print(f'  TOTAL_PROFILES={len(data)}')
else:
    print('  ERROR: ' + str(data)[:300])
"

# 5. Get JV deals

"

# PITR STATUS CHECK — query Supabase database backup info
export SB_URL="https://kvclcdjmjghndxsngfzb.supabase.co"
export SB_KEY="eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJpc3MiOiJzdXBhYmFzZSIsInJlZiI6Imt2Y2xjZGptamdobmR4c25nZnpiIiwicm9sZSI6InNlcnZpY2Vfcm9sZSIsImlhdCI6MTc3MzE5NDAyNywiZXhwIjoyMDg4NzcwMDI3fQ.TaTRyViK-8sv3R_g1Me08sEjnyMskGXKF0u-I-PTaQ8"

echo "=== PITR STATUS CHECK ==="
# Check if Supabase project is reachable (indicates Pro plan with PITR)
HTTP=$(curl -s -o /dev/null -w "%{http_code}" "${SB_URL}/rest/v1/" -H "apikey: ${SB_KEY}" -H "Authorization: Bearer ${SB_KEY}")
echo "  supabase_reachable: HTTP ${HTTP}"

# Check project info via Supabase REST API
echo "  project_ref: kvclcdjmjghndxsngfzb"
echo "  project_url: ${SB_URL}"

# Check if we can query pg_stat_replication or WAL info
curl -s "${SB_URL}/rest/v1/rpc/ivx_exec_sql" \
  -X POST \
  -H "apikey: ${SB_KEY}" -H "Authorization: Bearer ${SB_KEY}" \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -d '{"sql_text":"SELECT pg_is_in_recovery(), pg_current_wal_lsn(), now() as current_time"}' 2>&1 | python3 -c "
import sys, json
try:
    data = json.load(sys.stdin)
    if isinstance(data, list) and data:
        row = data[0]
        print(f\"  in_recovery={row.get('pg_is_in_recovery','?')}\")
        print(f\"  current_wal_lsn={row.get('pg_current_wal_lsn','?')}\")
        print(f\"  current_time={row.get('current_time','?')}\")
    elif isinstance(data, dict):
        print(f\"  result={json.dumps(data)[:300]}\")
    else:
        print(f\"  result={str(data)[:300]}\")
except:
    print('  WAL query not available via REST RPC')
"
